5.question_text: What is the sum of the place values of the two 5s in the number 5,32,150?
How many hours and minutes are in 200 minutes?
You bake 24 cookies. You keep 6 for yourself and share the rest equally among 3 friends. How many cookies does each friend get?
Which pair of lines will never intersect, no matter how far they are extended?

6.question_text: What is the value of the expression: 15-(3×2)+4?
Which of the following fraction is equivalent to 2/3?
If the length of a rectangular garden is 12 meters and its width is 5 meters, what is the perimeter of the garden?
Write down the prime numbers between 10 and 20.
A baker makes 144 cupcakes in one hour. How many cupcakes will the baker make in 6 hours?

7.question_text: What is the value of the expression 8x – 10, when x = 5?
Two angles are complementary. If one angle measures 50°, what is the measure of the other angle?
Convert into a decimal and a percentage.

8.question_text: 264 added to a number makes it 452. Set up an algebraic equation to find the number.
If 3kg of rice costs 120, how much will 7kg of the same rice cost?
In an isosceles triangle, if the unequal angle is 70°, what are the measures of the other two angles?
Write 1/25 as fraction with denominator a power of 10.

9.question_text: What is the area of a square whose diagonal length is 8 cm?
6 workers can do a job in 6 days, how many days will 3 workers take?
What will be the value of 5 times the square of 4?
Find the circumference of circle whose diameter is 4.2?
